title: BEM-843 execute 842
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:32 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_read_841_and_verify_triad.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif status_in=='missing_dispatch_results' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch results'
elif status_in=='missing_claude_runtime_state' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing Claude runtime state proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='missing_real_claude_response' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem843_real_response_retry.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-843 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: return the actual review response for the multi-agent architecture/protocol agreement. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. This must not be a runtime blocker placeholder. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 repair missing real Claude response proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='unknown_bem842_route'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-842 status and missing proofs'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute BEM-842 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-842 next step by queuing the missing proof repair or selecting protocol processing')
"""
